examples: Some of the most committed bibliophiles maintain an almost fetishistic devotion to the physical book.
OK, I know I am a little bit fetishistic. I wouldn't take it seriously if it is told by friends or families.
In Japan the fetishistic love for two-dimensional characters is enough of a phenomenon to have earned its own slang word, MOE, homonymous with the Japanese words for "burning" or "budding."
Instead of adapting carefully to new market dynamics, they chase fads or become fetishistic about protecting minor habits they associate with their rise to greatness.
They grumble about his fetishistic use of steel, aluminium and glass.
